item.title: The host app needs to be more like a dashboard

output:
Implemented dashboard layout for authenticated host pages.

- Added `DashboardLayout` and `AppSidebar`.
- Nested `/` and `/settings` under the private dashboard shell.
- Kept `/auth` and public booking routes outside the sidebar layout.
- Removed duplicate Settings, Back, and Sign out controls from page chrome.
- Added sidebar/sheet/tooltip/skeleton primitives and mobile sidebar support.
- Verified with `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build`.

RUN_OK: Dashboard sidebar layout implemented for host app; auth and public booking layouts preserved.
